title: War-driven energy crisis boosts China’s sales pitch for renewable tech
summary_full: Sales of Chinese electric vehicles and solar panels have surged since the start of the Iran war, companies say.
summary_public: Sales of Chinese electric vehicles and solar panels have surged since the start of the Iran war, companies say.
